prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: small brown metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small gray metal sphere
  - obj_8: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_9: large purple metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0121] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0122] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0123] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0126] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0127] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0128] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0129] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0130] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0131] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0132] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0133] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0134] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0135] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0136] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0137] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0138] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0139] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0140] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
